description_long: This is a rugged, utilitarian axe featuring a robust, dark metallic head with a pronounced wedge shape and a pointed rear spike. The blade is broad and slightly curved, showing signs of wear and oxidation, giving it a weathered, industrial appearance. The handle is made of wood, displaying a rich, brown coloration with visible grain and a slightly rough, aged texture. The handle is straight with a rectangular cross-section, tapering slightly towards the end for a secure grip. The head is mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fit, with no visible fasteners or modern attachments. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for heavy-duty urban or construction tasks.
description: A weathered axe with a dark, wedge-shaped metal head and a straight, brown wooden handle, showing signs of heavy use and age.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe head, including the broad blade and pointed rear spike, with the wooden handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the alignment of the head with the handle, minimizing visible details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the axe head, with similar blade and spike features, and the handle's texture visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the rear, emphasizing the pointed spike and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a rectangular cross-section, slightly tapered, rough texture, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_blade_design: Wedge-shaped, single broad cutting edge with a pointed rear spike, no beard, utilitarian and functional with visible wear.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit, blade head fitted onto the handle with no visible fasteners.
